name: Breakfast Volcanos
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 1 cup of Mock Hollandaise Sauce and set aside.
2. Steam the chopped onion and green pepper in a little water until soft.
3. Add the egg substitute to make "scrambled eggs."
4. Split the English muffins and toast them.
5. Place one slice of tomato on each muffin.
6. Top with scrambled egg mixture and 2 tablespoons of Mock Hollandaise Sauce.
7. Repeat steps 1-6 for a total of 4 servings.
~------------------------------------------------------
